subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Holy Threshold! We have read what flowed out from thy pen in thy love for God, and found the contents of thy letter
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه الهی آنچه از خامه محبت الله جاری قرائت گردید و از مضامینش
subcodes.subjects: @reincarnation, @soul; spirit after death, @return of the Manifestations of God, @proofs for the existence; immortality of the soul, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @attaining the life of the spirit, @soul is the essential reality of man, @progress only takes place within its own degree
